title: rubus × lacteicomiformis
intro: Rubus × lacteicomiformis, a hybrid species of the Rubus genus, is a type of flowering raspberry plant known for its unique characteristics and potential health benefits. The medicinal properties of Rubus × lacteicomiformis lie in its high antioxidant and anti-inflammatory content, which has been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and provide relief from gastrointestinal issues. Rubus × lacteicomiformis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in salves and topical applications for its anti-inflammatory properties.
